libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Preserve/add JVM and native-image test arguments `--add-opens=java.base/java.util=ALL-UNNAMED` when tests cover `shaded.parquet.com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.util.ClassUtil.findEnumType` with `EnumSet` or `EnumMap`; the shaded Jackson code reflectively opens private `java.util.EnumSet.elementType` and `java.util.EnumMap.keyType`. The reported failure is a Jackson behavior/assertion mismatch for enum annotation introspection in the newer shaded Jackson version, not evidence of a missing dependency or service.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8256 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.parquet:parquet-jackson:1.16.0; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Avoid adding unshaded Jackson dependencies; the artifact relocates Jackson under `shaded.parquet.com.fasterxml.jackson` and already embeds Jackson 2.19.2 classes.
Do not use Docker or external services; normal use is in-process JSON serialization/deserialization.
Current failing test may require adapting assertions to the new shaded Jackson behavior rather than adding setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependencies or Docker services are needed: parquet-jackson is a self-contained shaded Jackson bundle. Meaningful coverage that exercises Jackson's EnumSet/EnumMap type-location path does need the existing java.util module opening on modern JDKs.
